infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Punchless needs your location to automatically mark attendance when you arrive at the workshop.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Punchless needs background location access to track attendance and travel time even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Punchless needs location access to automatically track your attendance, travel, and on-site work time.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Punchless needs your location to track attendance and travel time.
